title: Software Update - Headset and all other components are up to date - UI
scenario: Software Update tab in Device Settings shows "up to date" status with device image, name, and firmware version for each component when all are current
steps: Tap on a connected device to open Device Settings
Tap on the Software Update tab
Observe the list of components (e.g., Headset, Charge Stand, Charge Case) when all are up to date
expected: Each component (Headset, Charge Stand, or Charge Case) displays its device image, name, an "up to date" message, and the current firmware version.
